description_long: This is a modern office building complex composed of two interconnected rectangular structures, each with multiple stories and flat roofs. The facades are dominated by large, continuous blue-tinted windows that wrap around each floor, separated by white horizontal bands, giving the building a sleek and contemporary appearance. The complex is set on a landscaped plot with green lawns, small square planters, and several stylized trees, all bordered by gray walkways and driveways. The main entrance is a prominent glass door located at the corner of the larger building, easily accessible from the surrounding pavement. Rooftop details include HVAC units and skylights, adding to the realism of the structure. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a functional yet inviting urban presence.
description: A sleek, multi-story modern office building complex with large blue windows, white facades, and landscaped surroundings featuring trees and planters.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, two connected buildings, green lawns, and several trees along the side.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the long window bands, rear landscaping, and the connection between the two building volumes.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the back facades, rooftop details, and additional trees and planters.
description_view_3: Front-right view emphasizing the main entrance, prominent window bands, and the landscaped area with planters and trees.
attribute_window_pattern: Continuous horizontal bands of large rectangular windows wrapping around each floor, regularly spaced and separated by white spandrels.
